questions.question: Which of the following is not a magnetic substance?
questions.question_html: Which of the following is not a magnetic substance?
questions.explanation: Silver is not a magnetic substance because magnets do not attract it while cobalt, nickle and iron are magnetic substances.

questions.question: Lodestone is a
questions.explanation: Loadstone is a naturally magnetized piece of the mineral magnetite. The property of magnetism was first discovered in loadstone by Magnes, a shepherd who lived in ancient Greece.

questions.question: The south pole of the freely suspended magnet points towards
questions.question_html: The south pole of the freely suspended magnet points towards
questions.explanation: The south pole of a freely suspended magnet will point towards the Earth's magnetic north pole. This is because magnets have a north pole and a south pole, and opposite magnetic poles attract each other while like magnetic poles repel each other. The Earth's geographic south Pole is actually a magnetic north pole, so the north pole of a magnet is attracted to it.

questions.question: The end of a free hanging magnet which points towards North is called
questions.question_html: The end of a free hanging magnet which points towards North is called
questions.explanation: Freely suspended bar magnet always comes to rest in a particular direction, which is the North-South direction. The end of the magnet that points towards the North is called it's North seeking end or the North pole of the magnet. Similarly, the other end that points towards South is called it's South seeking end or the South pole.

questions.question: Magnet was discovered by
questions.explanation: It is said that, magnet was discovered by a shepherd named Magnes who lived in ancient Greece. One day he found that his stick which had a small piece of iron attached to one end was being attracted by rock. This rock was a natural magnet. This is how natural magnets was discovered.

questions.question: Artificial magnets are made of
questions.explanation: To make an artificial magnets the material needs to be ferromagnetic. Hence special iron and steel alloys are used to magnetize. Also their retention capability is pretty high.

questions.explanation: In any kind of a magnet, like poles repels and unlike poles attract. So the statement in option 1 is false.

questions.question: Which shape of magnet is used in electric bell?
questions.question_html: Which shape of magnet is used in electric bell?
questions.explanation: In electric bell, horse-shoe shaped electromagnet is used. When the current flows through the circuit, the electromagnet makes a magnetic field. The arm hits the gong, which makes a sound.
